title: Dragon Alchemists
description: A mod that adds several dragons and a magic system based off of them
body:
HERE BE DRAGONS! A literal dragons mod aimed towards enhancing the vanilla experiece, with magical items based on those dragons!
Some drops of dragons include: Skulls (Rare, decorative), Dragon flesh (great food source), Dragon bone (WIP), Dragon Shards (Epic, WIP)

Some examples of dragons include (WIP): Flowerfang, Cavehorn, and 3 more

The dragons shards can be used to create one of 5 elemental staffs, relating to each dragon's power (Cavehorn - Earth, Flowerfang - Wind)

The ender drgon also drops a shard (WIP) and it would create a void element.
If done properly it can also combine with the other 5 elements to create derrivatives!
